name: Yogurt Muffins
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large mixing bowl, combine flour, sugar, baking powder, baking soda, and salt.
2. Gently stir in yogurt and milk, blending just until the dry ingredients are moistened.
3. Fill lightly greased muffin cups about 3/4 full.
4. Bake at 400°F for 18 minutes or until well-browned.
5. Serve warm.
